overview: BiggPocket is a professional loan application tracking system for DSA companies. It provides an admin panel for managing loans, users, and teams, with a customer-facing tracker showing real-time loan progress through 11 stages. Features role-based access, financial tracking with disbursed/sanctioned amounts, and a responsive fintech UI.
features: Admin dashboard with clickable metrics and financial totals (disbursed, sanctioned, required amounts)
Loan management with 11-stage tracking and rejection support
Role-based access: admin full control, internal users can edit financials, external users read-only
Customer dashboard with personal metrics filtered to assigned loans
Multi-user loan assignment with internal/external team classification
Document upload and management per loan
Secure OTP-based login with no admin credentials exposed
Teams management with user type classification and deletion restrictions
Mobile-first responsive design with BiggPocket orange/blue branding
